rulePrefixes.code-html-emphasis: Fenced code blocks, language hints, inline HTML boundaries, emphasis markers, and nearby readability concerns
rulePrefixes.links-images-accessibility: Link syntax, fragments, reference links, image handling, descriptive link text, alt text, and accessibility review edges
rulePrefixes.tables-layout-edges: Table formatting, row consistency, blank-line boundaries, compact versus expanded layout choices, and nearby layout edge cases
